description: 10-fold CatBoost trained on tabular features, returns OOF and test predictions.

interface.entrypoint: fit_predict(X_train, y_train, X_test, cat_features=None, n_folds=10, is_classification=True) -> (oof_preds, test_preds, model_list)
interface.input_shapes: X_train: pd.DataFrame, y_train: np.ndarray, X_test: pd.DataFrame
interface.output_shapes: oof_preds: np.ndarray, test_preds: np.ndarray, model_list: list

usage_example: oof, test_preds, models = fit_predict(X_train, y_train, X_test, cat_features=['sex','cp'])
known_pitfalls: Categorical columns must be passed as cat_features by name or index, not one-hot encoded.
Requires y_train to be numeric-encoded for classification.
